final:
module packet_filter (
    input [4:0] src_ip,
    input control,
    output reg obf_accept
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (control) begin
            case (src_ip)
                5'b00001: obf_accept = 1; // Accept IP 1
                5'b00010: obf_accept = 1; // Accept IP 2
                5'b00011: obf_accept = 1; // Accept IP 3
                default: obf_accept = 0;   // Block all others
            endcase
        end else begin
            obf_accept = 1; // Accept all if control is 0
        end
    end
endmodule
